3134140.name: Small Maze
3134140.description:
This is a delightful entertainment game!

You have to walk through a maze of levels by yourself, and once you pass, you will enter the next level, which is even more difficult

You need to carefully plan your route through the maze at each level, and strive to find the correct route to pass in the shortest possible time

The entire game screen is rich and colorful, full of vitality, and the background music is vivid and dynamic, adding more fun to your gaming experience! Get ready to face challenges and become the fastest consumer entertainment player
3134140.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
